metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students develop skills in musical theatre performance, combining acting, singing, and dancing. This course emphasizes character development, musical interpretation, and performance in the musical theatre form.
metadata.general_description: A course focused on musical theatre performance combining acting, singing, and dance.

big_ideas.statement: Musical theatre integrates acting, singing, and dancing into a unified performance form.
big_ideas.elaboration: Musical theatre performers develop interdisciplinary skills, combining multiple performance disciplines to create compelling theatrical experiences.

big_ideas.statement: Music and lyrics communicate character development, emotion, and narrative in musical theatre.
big_ideas.elaboration: Songs in musical theatre function dramatically, revealing character motivation, advancing plot, and expressing emotions more deeply than dialogue alone.

big_ideas.statement: Character development in musical theatre requires understanding both spoken and sung text.
big_ideas.elaboration: Musical theatre performers develop characters by analyzing dialogue, interpreting music and lyrics, and making consistent choices across all performance elements.

big_ideas.statement: Musical theatre performance demands technical skill across multiple disciplines and emotional authenticity.
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful musical theatre performers balance technical execution of singing and dancing with genuine emotional connection and character truthfulness.

i_can_statements: I can sing songs with technical accuracy and emotional expression
I can interpret lyrics and understand vocal storytelling
I can support character development through singing
I can execute various singing styles appropriate to different shows

competencies.raw: Develop dance and movement in musical theatre
i_can_statements: I can execute choreography with precision and energy
I can move expressively while maintaining character
I can integrate dancing with singing and acting seamlessly
I can learn and perform complex dance combinations

competencies.raw: Develop character and acting skills in musical theatre contexts
i_can_statements: I can analyze musical theatre characters and their development
I can make consistent character choices across spoken and sung text
I can maintain character while managing technical demands
I can develop authentic emotional connection to character

competencies.raw: Integrate singing, dancing, and acting into unified musical theatre performance
i_can_statements: I can transition smoothly between singing, dancing, and speaking
I can execute multiple theatrical disciplines simultaneously
I can maintain character presence across all performance modes
I can create cohesive, integrated musical theatre performances

competencies.raw: Analyze musical theatre scripts and songs
i_can_statements: I can analyze dramatic function of songs in shows
I can interpret lyrics for meaning and character subtext
I can understand how music supports and enhances storytelling
I can recognize how songs reveal character and advance plot

competencies.raw: Understand musical theatre forms and conventions
i_can_statements: I can identify musical theatre styles and genres
I can understand conventional structures of musical numbers
I can recognize how different styles use music and dance differently
I can appreciate diverse approaches to musical theatre

competencies.raw: Reflect on personal musical theatre development and performance
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my performance in singing, dancing, and acting
I can identify strengths and growth areas across disciplines
I can assess my character development and performance choices
I can set meaningful goals for musical theatre growth

competencies.raw: Connect musical theatre to broader theatrical and musical traditions
i_can_statements: I can understand the history and development of musical theatre
I can appreciate diverse musical theatre traditions and styles
I can recognize cultural influences on musical theatre forms
I can analyze how musical theatre reflects cultural moments

competencies.raw: Learn and memorize musical theatre material
i_can_statements: I can memorize lyrics, dialogue, and blocking accurately
I can retain musical material including melodies and harmonies
I can maintain performance consistency across rehearsals and shows
I can make script adjustments based on director feedback

competencies.raw: Perform musical theatre material with presence and engagement
i_can_statements: I can perform with focus and emotional connection
I can engage audiences through integrated musical theatre performance
I can maintain character and presence throughout performance
I can adapt performance based on audience response

competencies.raw: Communicate with directors, choreographers, and collaborators
i_can_statements: I can understand and respond to direction and choreography
I can ask clarifying questions about performance expectations
I can collaborate effectively with fellow performers
I can communicate professionally within ensemble contexts

competencies.raw: Share and discuss musical theatre work
i_can_statements: I can discuss my character and performance choices
I can give and receive constructive feedback
I can participate in post-show discussions and reflections
I can engage audiences about musical theatre and performances

competencies.raw: Connect musical theatre to other performance and art forms
i_can_statements: I can understand connections between musical theatre and opera
I can recognize relationships between musical theatre and concerts
I can explore how musical theatre integrates visual design
I can appreciate musical theatre as interdisciplinary art

competencies.raw: Explore diverse musical theatre traditions and styles
i_can_statements: I can learn musical theatre from diverse cultural traditions
I can perform in various musical theatre styles and genres
I can appreciate non-Western musical theatre forms
I can develop versatility across musical theatre styles

competencies.raw: Engage with musical theatre as social and cultural expression
i_can_statements: I can understand musical theatre's role in cultural expression
I can recognize how musical theatre reflects historical moments
I can participate in musical theatre addressing social themes
I can use musical theatre as platform for diverse perspectives

competencies.raw: Build awareness of musical theatre careers and professional opportunities
i_can_statements: I can understand pathways to professional musical theatre
I can develop skills relevant to musical theatre industry
I can network with musical theatre professionals
I can build portfolio of musical theatre work

areas.name: Musical Theatre Vocal Performance
topics: Musical theatre singing styles and techniques

areas.name: Dance and Movement in Musical Theatre
areas.raw: Dance and Movement in Musical Theatre
topics: Integration of dance with character and emotion
Various dance styles in musical theatre
Stamina and coordination for singing while dancing

areas.name: Character Development in Musical Theatre
topics: Using music to explore character emotions

areas.name: Musical Theatre Forms and Traditions
topics: History and development of musical theatre
Various musical theatre genres and styles
Analysis of professional musical theatre works
